pages.raw_text:
One OF the ordinances introduced
at the last meeting Of the city
council dealing with the local gas
situation and with the lighting
companies in general, provides
that the collection of fees or de-
posits by any company other than
allowed by its franchise shall be
unlawful and punishable by a fine
Of 500 In each instance.


This Is q far reaching ordinance.
1t will forever relegate to the past
the iniquitous deposit system so
long practiced by the Gas company
and Electric Light company, just
as they have been relegated In
many eastern cities where the PEG.
pie know and demand their rights.
